description: Sample orchestrator workflow prompt for debugging an intermittent auth failure.
prompt: Debug this function: authenticateUser(token) throwing 'Invalid signature' intermittently. Identify root cause and propose fix.
expectedSubtasks: Inspect signature generation and timing aspects
Identify race condition or encoding issue
notes: Feed the 'prompt' value to command 'vibe.planOrchestrator'. After plan generation, run 'vibe.executePlan'. Verify tree items match expectedSubtasks semantics and failed nodes show tooltip errors.
